name: json-to-csv
goal: Read the JSON file at users.json (a list of objects each with keys: id, name, email, signup_date). Write a CSV file at users.csv with a header row 'id,name,email,signup_date' followed by one data row per object, in the same order they appear in the JSON.

notes.purpose: Tier 1 deterministic JSON→CSV conversion. Inverse of csv-to-json. The @ regex confirms email addresses survived the transform.
